title: Rich Savory Portuguese Pork Skewers
description: Indulgent Portuguese dish featuring garlicky pork skewers with a lacquer glaze, made with kombu for added depth of flavor, and nut-free-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: kombu
ingredients.notes: dried and cut into small pieces

ingredients.name: lacquer glaze
ingredients.notes: made with honey and soy sauce

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the lacquer glaze and kombu pieces in a small saucepan and bring to a simmer over low heat.
Brush the lacquer glaze mixture onto the skewers during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional garlic and paprika if desired.
